question.label: Friction scan
question.name: What's been slower or harder than it should have been?
question.description: Invites them to name blockers without framing it as complaint.

assessment.note: [SKIP] no signal — planner bypassed, queue carried forward

new_queue.label: Opening pace check
new_queue.name: How's the last two weeks actually felt — energy-wise?

new_queue.label: Priority clarity
new_queue.name: What are you actually focused on this week, and why those things?

new_queue.label: Start with context
new_queue.name: Before we get specific, what feels most worth talking through today?

new_queue.label: Decision drag
new_queue.name: Where are decisions still hanging around longer than they should?

new_queue.label: Hidden rework
new_queue.name: What part of the work is creating extra churn for you?

new_queue.label: Ownership shift
new_queue.name: Where have you had to take the lead more than expected lately?

new_queue.label: Update landing
new_queue.name: How are your updates landing with the people who rely on them?

new_queue.label: Tradeoff call
new_queue.name: What are you choosing not to do this cycle?

new_queue.label: Manager leverage
new_queue.name: What would make the next two weeks easier from my side?

new_queue.label: Support gap
new_queue.name: What support are you not getting enough of right now?

new_queue.label: Sustainable pace
new_queue.name: Does this pace feel sustainable for the next couple of weeks?

new_queue.label: Close on next step
new_queue.name: Given what we covered, where do you want to focus first?
